'''Salyer''' was a composer from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] who lived centuries before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. [[Gender/Legends|His]] largely uninspired compositions were forgotten by [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large until it was plagiarized by the ill-fated student [[Thelaa]].
